causalAutopsy.notes: Step 2 of Justin's 'No Silent Degradation to Brittle Fallback' directive (2026-06-07, topic 19437). The gate-flips (#991) made safety gates fail closed; this adds swap-before-fail-closed so a rate-limited provider routes to another healthy one first, only failing closed if all are down. Herd-aware (gating-only + circuit-skip) to preserve the router's deliberate anti-herding design.
